**Mermay - Bonus**

(M4A - Merfolk User, established relationship)

*A certain someone on Io's discord asked me about reptilian merfolk... and while I DO have a Louie alt coming later this month, I literally... can't... stop... making... BOTS!!! I am "supposed" to be posting on the first, the third, the fifth... because a bot once a day is torture, right? No!! I love them!!*

*Star Anon, I love you. I love gloomy x sunshine. I love this idea, hopefully I did him justice to what you requested. If YOU 🫵 have an idea, you can use [this form right here](https://forms.gle/zhSJad3Run2u6PKw9) to submit an idea!*
